_comment: Complete Claude Code settings.json with all hook configurations.
Copy this to .claude/settings.json and adjust paths as needed.

PreToolUse._comment: Lint staged files before every git commit
Run tests before every git push

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format files after Claude edits them

Notification._comment: Send desktop notification when Claude completes a task

Stop._comment: Run any cleanup when Claude stops working

_examples_advanced._comment: Additional hook patterns you can mix in:

PreToolUse_block_dangerous_commands.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".input.command" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|DROP TABLE|format c:"; then echo "Blocked dangerous command" >&2; exit 1; fi'

PreToolUse_require_branch_for_push.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [[ "$BRANCH" == "main" || "$BRANCH" == "master" ]]; then echo "Direct push to $BRANCH blocked" >&2; exit 1; fi'

PostToolUse_stage_formatted_files.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]]; then git add "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
